title: citrus × aurantium var. torulosa
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. torulosa, also known as bitter orange, is a variety of the bitter orange tree, a citrus species native to Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. torulosa include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared through various herbal preparations, such as making tea from its leaves or using its essential oil in aromatherapy and skincare products.
